name: Chicken-Vegetable Skillet
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle the chicken with 1/4 teaspoon of salt.
2. In a large non-stick fry pan, heat the oil over medium-high temperature.
3. Add chicken and cook, turning occasionally, about 8 minutes or until brown on both sides. Remove chicken; set aside.
4. In the same pan, layer potatoes, onion, chicken, mushrooms, and tomato.
5. In a 1-cup measure, mix together broth and wine. Pour over chicken and vegetables. Sprinkle oregano, remaining salt, and pepper over all.
6. Heat to boiling; cover, reduce heat to medium-low, and cook for about 20 minutes or until the chicken and vegetables are fork tender.
7. Sprinkle with fresh parsley before serving.
